name: MA Crossover
description: Classic dual moving average crossover. Buy when fast MA crosses above slow MA, sell when it crosses below.
description_zh: 经典双均线交叉策略。快线上穿慢线做多，下穿做空。

name: RSI Oversold Bounce
description: Enter long when RSI bounces from oversold territory. Exit when RSI reaches overbought.
description_zh: 当 RSI 跌破超卖线后回升时入场做多，RSI 超买时平仓。

name: Bollinger Band Squeeze Breakout
description: Trade breakouts after Bollinger Band squeezes. Long on upper band breakout, short on lower.
description_zh: 布林带收缩后突破上轨做多、下轨做空，利用波动率爆发行情。

name: MACD Divergence
description: Enter long on bullish MACD divergence (price makes lower low but MACD doesn't). Short on bearish divergence.
description_zh: 价格创新低但 MACD 未创新低（底背离）时做多，顶背离时做空。

name: Grid Trading
description: Place buy/sell orders at regular intervals within a price range. Profits from range-bound markets.
description_zh: 在指定价格区间设置等距买卖网格，震荡行情中自动低买高卖。

name: Dollar Cost Averaging
description: Buy a fixed amount at regular intervals to average out the cost basis over time.
description_zh: 定期等额买入，长期平摊成本。适合 BTC/ETH 等长期看好的资产。

name: Volume Breakout
description: Enter when price breaks above recent high with above-average volume. ATR-based stop loss.
description_zh: 当价格突破近期高点且成交量放大时入场，结合 ATR 止损。

name: BB Mean Reversion
description: Buy when price touches lower Bollinger Band, sell at upper band. Best for ranging markets.
description_zh: 价格触碰布林带下轨时做多，触碰上轨时平仓。适合震荡市。

name: Turtle Trading
description: Classic trend following. Enter on 20-day high breakout, exit on 10-day low. ATR-based position sizing.
description_zh: 经典趋势跟踪策略。突破 20 日高点入场，跌破 10 日低点出场，ATR 仓位管理。

name: Pairs Trading
description: Trade the spread between two correlated assets. Short the outperformer, long the underperformer when spread diverges.
description_zh: 找两个高相关性标的，价差偏离均值时做空强势、做多弱势，价差回归时平仓。

name: Momentum Rotation
description: Rank a universe of assets by momentum score weekly. Hold the top N performers and rebalance.
description_zh: 每周评估一组标的的动量得分，持有得分最高的 N 个，定期再平衡。
